name: I Bambini e Noi
overview: The six episodes of the series "I bambini e noi" by Luigi Comencini (1916-2007) are a great realistic and live fresco of Italian childhood between the 60s and 70s. Aired in 1970, Comencini's work unfolds in various locations in our country, from Milan to Naples, from Umbria to Puglia, from Rome to Turin.

trailers.title: I bambini e Noi Luigi comencini - Indagine sui bambini di diversi ceti sociali (1970) PARTE 1
